历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including old Gaokao science) were 6430 → 6637 → 5547 → 3863 → 3672 respectively. After the 2024 Anhui new Gaokao reform, rankings significantly advanced, stabilizing around 3800 in 2024-2025, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 3672. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui has been continuously shrinking: 2021: 189 → 2022: 157 → 2023: 157 → 2024: 116 → 2025: 101 → 2026: 70, with a reduction of about 30.7% in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a stable range of 28-32 in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering institution. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the historical event of the 2023 Telecommunications Department admission ranking dropping to 60,000, which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), indicating certain social attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 10 disciplines received A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous majors at DUT are all highly recommended/highly popular, with high social interest. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui is approximately 313,000 (estimated), a slight decrease of about 2.3% from 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core factor of a significant 30.7% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, which intensifies competition, along with secondary factors such as a slight decrease in total candidates and a somewhat negative reputation, the ranking is expected to advance significantly from the 2025 baseline of 3672. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3026, with a range of 2572-3480.

For rankings within the predicted range (2572-3480), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target and Tier 1 as a stretch; for rankings significantly above the lower bound, prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
